2026-03-25T18:53:23.7740957Z ##[group]Run actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd
2026-03-25T18:53:23.7741500Z with:
2026-03-25T18:53:23.7743669Z   script: const fs = require('fs');
const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
if (!outputFile) {
  core.info('No agent output found');
  return;
}
const agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
for (const item of items) {
  await github.rest.issues.createComment({
    owner: context.repo.owner,
    repo: context.repo.repo,
    issue_number: context.issue.number,
    body: item.message
  });
  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${context.issue.number}`);
}

2026-03-25T18:53:23.7746666Z   debug: false

2026-03-25T18:53:23.7747398Z   result-encoding: json
2026-03-25T18:53:23.7747703Z   retries: 0
2026-03-25T18:53:23.7748065Z   retry-exempt-status-codes: 400,401,403,404,422
